creator: kmoore@FreeBSD.org
text:
I could probably add that to 10_ktrueos by default. For the record though, grub does not support auto-loading of module depends, so this would just be a fix for zfs / opensolaris. Any other modules would have to be listed along with their depends in /boot/loader.conf. Maybe the better solution is to add some sort of auto-detection to the script, so modules like this are auto-added to grub.cfg. 

At the moment I'm not aware of any way to list deps of a module via the shell, any ideas?
